episodes.title: 222 Leaving a cult ... Only to find another
episodes.description:
We have a tendency to leave a cult only to find something that acts a lot like it, thus we remain in the same position. Live 5/22/2026.

0:00 – Chapters forthcoming

🎙️ This podcast was a 2025 People's Choice Podcast Award nominee. On Apple Podcasts it's been the #1 most listened to show in the Philippines, and in the top 20 in France, Sweden, Belgium, Spain, Israel, Switzerland, Tanzania, and Australia.

REGULAR LIVE SHOW for independent thinkers who’ve outgrown spiritual, cultural and political fluff. Unfiltered commentary on politics, culture, music, religion, and society from a rational, historical and politically conservative perspective. 

I’m Aaron Joy in Portland, Maine, USA (also known in spiritual circles as Premanand Das Bhagat).
I'm a writer, musician, ultra-runner, and former thespian. Visit my website for my books. I'm also trained as an Integral Vedic Counselor, Certified Spiritual Life Coach and Ayurveda Specialist, and follow the spiritual path of Hinduism (Sanatana Dharma).

episodes.title: 209 Wanting to return to a cult ... is normal!
episodes.description:
Discussing why people want to return to a cult and the period in time in which this is most likely, plus how to avoid doing this. Using examples from others & my own time in Adidam (following Adi Da Samraj). Live 3/4/2026.

0:00 – Intro to discussing leaving & returning to a cult
2:18 – Time when most likely to return to a cult | not knowing/out of touch with the world outside a cult | loss of comfort zone outside cult
6:07 – Break | offering french fries for covid shot
7:54 – Situation leading to my leaving Adidam cult | questioning Adidam stories
11:49 – Formally leaving Adidam
14:16 – Wanting to return to Adidam in months following departure due to all feelings that led me to join | joining a cult due to depression & bad life | looking for place of hope & solutions
17:46 – Joining the world outside a cult is scary | growing up in a cult & not prepared to deal with real world
19:55 – Break | Elvis Whiskey
20:48 – What happens immediately after leaving a cult | positive vs negative situations | Ramakrishna-Vivekananda Center story | replacing cult with positive alcoholic
26:14 – Cult is a comfort zone | natural instinct to return to cult, like staying in abusive relationships
27:46 – My attempt to return to Adidam via Facebook, keeping Adi Da Samraj as part of my spirituality & returning depression | gaslighting by Adidam devotees | Sri Dharma Pravatarka Acharya of DharmaNation helped break me of Adidam's immature teachings | breaking emotionally | leaving Sri Acharya @DharmaNation 
36:14 – Many want to return to cults | dealing with our cult past & issues & emotions | questioning personal beliefs
39:25 – Being in a cult is 24/7 | Satya Sai Baba cult story | woke progressives are a cult
44:31 – Responding to comments | Stray Kids K-Pop group | not "crying about libs" when liberal politicians act like babies

episodes.title: 100 NXIVM's Keith Raniere REACTION VIDEO. Jailed sex cult leader, but what did he say?
episodes.description:
0:00 – We all know of the horrible person Keith Raniere who abused women in his cult of NXIVM, and was glorified by Battlestar Galactica cast member Alison Mack, but what did he say that was so alluring to so many? Nobody joins a cult willingly. They do so because something resonates, so I wanted to try to see. This reaction video does not excuse Keith, what it does is try to see (as I do in all my reaction videos) is how frauds/con-men/fake gurus/cult leaders speak, and to learn what we should avoid.

Source videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Dfp5q3T4j8Y
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=i9Buo3Gj3Zk
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=z-J8x1_pMpM

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Afew5XpqrJs

Live 2/23/2024, unedited and off the cuff.

Weekly live show on society & religion, plus Vedic scriptures. Vaishnava. Combating conversion! Sanatana Dharma not Neo-Hinduism.

I am Premanand Das Bhagat (Aaron Joy), in Maine USA.
📣 * Contact: aronmatyas@hotmail.com
* My books: http://www.aaronjoyauthor.weebly.com 

I want to help you grow spiritually, discover your life's purpose, and know god!

📚 I'm a Mystic, Certified Spiritual Life Coach, Certified Ayurveda Specialist, and currently studying Integrel Vedic Counseling under Dr. David Frawley (Pandit Vamadeva Shastri). Spiritual name bestowed by Dr. Chaturbhai Babaria (via Swaminaryan Gurukul USA, Ramanuja lineage). Student of Dr. Frawley & Sri Dharma Pravartaka Acharya.
